mensaje:
🎉 *Happy New Year 2026 from ORION Tech!* 🎉

Dear Mike Counsil Plumbing Team,

As we begin this exciting new year, we wanted to reach out with a special opportunity designed specifically for your company.

After researching your 30+ years of excellence in the South Bay, your partnerships with the *San Jose Sharks, Earthquakes, and Giants*, and your commitment to 24/7 service, we've prepared a comprehensive AI-powered operations proposal:

🔗 *VIEW YOUR CUSTOM PROPOSAL:*
https://agem2024.github.io/SEGURITI-USC/mike-counsil-proposal.html

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*WHAT'S INCLUDED:*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚡ *50 Simultaneous AI Voice Calls*
   Never miss a lead at 3AM again

🚀 *10 Virtual AI Dispatchers*
   Working 24/7, zero scheduling conflicts

🚛 *Complete Fleet Management*
   GPS tracking for 100+ vehicles

⏰ *Time Cards & Payroll Integration*
   GPS-verified clock in/out, direct export to ADP/Paychex

📦 *InvAI Smart Inventory*
   Track every part in every truck in real-time

📄 *Zero Paper Operations*
   100% digital work orders, e-signatures, instant reports

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*KEY BENEFITS:*
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ *Eliminate the $89 estimate visit* with FREE AI diagnosis
✅ *+40% lead capture* with zero friction
✅ *-30% price complaints* with transparent Good/Better/Best options
✅ *$28K+ monthly savings* projected
✅ *2 hours/day saved per technician*

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

We'd love to schedule a demo at your convenience. The proposal is fully bilingual (English/Spanish) - just click the language selector.

Looking forward to making 2026 your most efficient year yet!

Best regards,
*Alex Espinosa*
CEO, ORION Tech Solutions
📞 (669) 234-2444
🌐 orion-tech.com
